name: Overhead Triceps Extension
setup: Sit on bench or stand, holding dumbbell overhead with both hands
Hands cupping the inner plate of dumbbell
execution: Lower dumbbell behind head by bending elbows
Elbows point to ceiling, upper arms stay vertical
Extend back overhead by contracting triceps
common_mistakes: Not getting full stretch at bottom
cues: Elbows pointed at the ceiling — don't let them drift
Feel the stretch in the long head at the bottom
advantages: Hits triceps long head (unique growth stimulus)
